description: CompositionBlue, white and red check skirt made of 100% cotton, has a buttoned and zipper closure in the front at the waist, box pleats, two side pockets and two buttoned patch pockets at the backFittingComfortWash careWash separately with mild detergent Do not bleach Dry flat in shade Do not iron directly on print or embroidery Dry clean preferred Designed for your pretty little princess, this checked skirt from ant oozes girly attitude. The box pleats lend it a cute vibe, while the fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with a lace top or T-shirt and crocs sandals and watch your little girl enjoy in absolute comfort.
